title: scrophularia alata var. borealikoreana
intro: Scrophularia alata var. borealikoreana, also known as Korean toothwort, is a plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) and is native to Korea. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Korean toothwort include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of Scrophularia alata var. borealikoreana can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
